zodiacWheel.title: Zodiac Wheel - Real-time Celestial Visualization
zodiacWheel.subtitle: Interactive astrological chart with live planetary positions and aspects
zodiacWheel.feature_realTimeDesc: Auto-refresh with adaptive intervals based on planet speeds
zodiacWheel.feature_aspectsDesc: Conjunction, sextile, square, trine, opposition, quincunx
zodiacWheel.testSubtitle: Comprehensive testing interface for the ZodiacWheel component with automated tests, configuration options, and visual validation.
zodiacWheel.testInstructionsDesc: Configure the wheel using controls below, then click "Run Tests" to validate functionality. Hover over planets to test tooltips. Try different themes and configurations to ensure everything works correctly.
zodiacWheel.zodiacCircleDesc: The outer ring shows the 12 zodiac signs (Aries through Pisces) arranged in a 360° circle.
zodiacWheel.planetsDesc: {{count}} celestial bodies are plotted at their current ecliptic positions. Each planet is positioned according to its longitude (0-360°) within the zodiac.
zodiacWheel.retroIndicatorDesc: Planets marked with ℞ are in retrograde motion (appearing to move backward from Earth's perspective). Currently: {{count}} retrograde.
zodiacWheel.aspectLinesDesc: Colored lines connecting planets show astrological aspects (angular relationships). {{count}} active aspects within {{orb}}° orb. Line colors indicate aspect type: gold (conjunction), cyan (sextile), red (square), green (trine), pink (opposition), purple (quincunx).
zodiacWheel.housesDesc: The 12 astrological houses are shown as divisions radiating from the center, calculated for {{lat}}°N, {{lon}}°E. Houses represent different life areas and are location-specific.
zodiacWheel.degreeMarksDesc: The circle is marked with degree indicators (0°, 30°, 60°, etc.) showing exact positions within the 360° zodiac wheel.
zodiacWheel.hoverHint: 💡 Hover over any planet to see detailed information including exact position, speed, distance, and aspects to other planets.
zodiacWheel.skyEventsTitle: Current Sky Events and Their Meanings
zodiacWheel.sunMeaning: Core identity and life force express through the {{element}} energy of {{sign}}
zodiacWheel.moonMeaning: Emotional needs and instincts align with the {{quality}} nature of {{sign}}
zodiacWheel.mercuryMeaning: Communication and thinking influenced by the {{sign}} approach
zodiacWheel.retroSuffix: (Retrograde: period of inner review and adjustment)
zodiacWheel.conjunctionMeaning: Energies blend and amplify; new beginnings and unified expression
zodiacWheel.oppositionMeaning: Polarity and tension; need for balance and integration of opposites
zodiacWheel.trineMeaning: Harmonious flow and natural talents; ease and support
zodiacWheel.squareMeaning: Dynamic tension and challenge; motivation for growth and action
zodiacWheel.sextileMeaning: Opportunity and potential; cooperation through effort
zodiacWheel.quincunxMeaning: Adjustment needed; different energies seeking integration
zodiacWheel.mercuryRetroMeaning: Communication, technology, and travel need extra care; time for review and adjustment
zodiacWheel.venusRetroMeaning: Relationships and values under review; rethinking what brings pleasure and worth
zodiacWheel.marsRetroMeaning: Energy and action turn inward; reassessing goals and strategies
zodiacWheel.outerRetroMeaning: {{planet}} themes require inner processing and philosophical revision
zodiacWheel.ascendantMeaning: Self-presentation and approach to life colored by {{sign}} qualities; first impressions and personal style
zodiacWheel.midheavenMeaning: Career direction and public reputation shaped by {{sign}}; life goals and achievements
zodiacWheel.chooseColorScheme: Choose a color scheme for the wheel
zodiacWheel.adaptiveRefreshDesc: Auto-adjust refresh rate based on planet speeds
zodiacWheel.runTestsHint: Click "Run Tests" to validate component functionality
zodiacWheel.testMsg_aspectsFail: No aspects found (may need to increase orb)
zodiacWheel.testMsg_longPass: All planet longitudes in valid range (0-360°)
zodiacWheel.testMsg_zodiacPass: All planets have zodiac sign assignments
zodiacWheel.scenario1Obj: Verify that the component loads and displays all essential elements
zodiacWheel.scenario1Step1: 1. Load the page with default configuration
zodiacWheel.scenario1Step2: 2. Wait for data to load (spinner should disappear)
zodiacWheel.scenario1Step3: 3. Verify zodiac circle is visible with 12 signs
zodiacWheel.scenario1Expected: Wheel renders completely within 1 second, all planets visible, smooth animations
zodiacWheel.scenario1Note: ✓ This is the baseline test - if this passes, core functionality works
zodiacWheel.scenario2Obj: Test aspect calculation and visual representation
zodiacWheel.scenario2Step3: 3. Look for colored lines connecting planets
zodiacWheel.scenario2Step4: 4. Verify different line styles (solid, dashed, dotted)
zodiacWheel.scenario2Step5: 5. Check aspect symbols at line midpoints
zodiacWheel.scenario2Step6: 6. Try increasing orb to 12° - more aspects should appear
zodiacWheel.scenario2Expected: Lines appear between aspecting planets, different colors for different aspects, aspect count increases with larger orb
zodiacWheel.scenario2Note: 💡 Aspect types: Conjunction (gold), Sextile (cyan), Square (red), Trine (green), Opposition (pink), Quincunx (purple)
zodiacWheel.scenario3Obj: Verify retrograde planet identification and display
zodiacWheel.scenario3Step2: 2. Look for ℞ symbol near planet labels
zodiacWheel.scenario3Step3: 3. Check Statistics tab for retrograde count
zodiacWheel.scenario3Step4: 4. Hover over retrograde planet for tooltip
zodiacWheel.scenario3Expected: Retrograde planets marked with ℞ symbol and red border, tooltip confirms retrograde status with badge
zodiacWheel.scenario4Obj: Test houses calculation and overlay display
zodiacWheel.scenario4Step1: 1. Set location (lat/long) if not already set
zodiacWheel.scenario4Step4: 4. Verify 12 house cusps appear as lines from center
zodiacWheel.scenario4Expected: 12 houses visible with cusps, numbers displayed, angular houses have bolder lines
zodiacWheel.scenario4Note: ⚠️ Houses require accurate location data. Default is Moscow.
zodiacWheel.scenario5Obj: Verify all themes render correctly with proper colors
zodiacWheel.scenario5Step2: 2. Switch to "Light" theme - verify colors invert
zodiacWheel.scenario5Step5: 5. Try "Lunar" - check for cool blue/grey tones
zodiacWheel.scenario5Step6: 6. Verify aspect line colors change appropriately
zodiacWheel.scenario5Expected: Each theme applies distinct color palette, all elements visible and readable in all themes
zodiacWheel.scenario6Step2: 2. Verify all elements still visible and readable
zodiacWheel.scenario6Step6: 6. Verify aspect lines remain visible at all sizes
zodiacWheel.scenario6Expected: Component scales smoothly, text remains readable, proportions maintained
zodiacWheel.scenario7Obj: Test auto-refresh and adaptive refresh functionality
zodiacWheel.scenario7Step3: 3. Wait for automatic refresh (should see toast)
zodiacWheel.scenario7Step5: 5. Check Statistics tab for update count
zodiacWheel.scenario7Step6: 6. Disable adaptive, set fixed interval to 1 min, wait for update
zodiacWheel.scenario7Expected: Updates occur automatically, counter increments, toast notifications appear, manual refresh works
zodiacWheel.scenario7Note: 💡 Adaptive refresh adjusts from 5-60 minutes based on planet speeds
zodiacWheel.scenario8Obj: Test hover interactions and tooltip content
zodiacWheel.scenario8Step1: 1. Hover over Sun - tooltip should appear
zodiacWheel.scenario8Step2: 2. Verify tooltip shows: position, sign, speed, distance
zodiacWheel.scenario8Step3: 3. If planet has aspects, they should be listed in tooltip
zodiacWheel.scenario8Step4: 4. Move to Moon - tooltip should update smoothly
zodiacWheel.scenario8Step5: 5. Hover over retrograde planet - check for ℞ badge
zodiacWheel.scenario8Step6: 6. Move mouse away - tooltip should disappear
zodiacWheel.scenario8Expected: Tooltips appear instantly on hover, show complete information, smooth transitions, accurate data
zodiacWheel.scenario9Step1: 1. Check Statistics tab for Load Time
zodiacWheel.scenario9Expected: Load time <1s, 60fps animations, no lag during interactions, test durations all <100ms
zodiacWheel.scenario10Obj: Test houses recalculation with different locations
zodiacWheel.scenario10Step7: 7. Planet positions should remain the same
zodiacWheel.scenario10Expected: Houses recalculate for new location, planet positions unchanged (they're geocentric)
zodiacWheel.tip3: • Use automated tests to verify core functionality
zodiacWheel.tip4: • Try edge cases (very small/large sizes, extreme orbs)
zodiacWheel.tip5: • Test on different browsers if possible
